# Orbitage - Cosmic Time Explorer

An interactive, futuristic web application that acts as a cosmic time capsule. It calculates real-time biological and astronomical counters measuring a user's life journey through the cosmos.

## Core Features
- Real-time running lifespan counters (seconds, heartbeats, space distance traveled around the sun, estimated dreams/sleep).
- Manual age input support and dropdown date selectors.
- Adaptive multilingual core (Arabic, English, German, Spanish, Turkish, Chinese) detecting browser language automatically.
- Progressive Web App (PWA) fully optimized for home screen installation.
